## BaseXBus.on() method

Retrieves an observable. See [XBus.on()](./x-components.xbus.on_2.md)<!-- -->.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
on<Event extends XEvent>(event: Event, withMetadata?: boolean): Observable<WirePayload<XEventPayload<Event>> | XEventPayload<Event>>;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  event | Event | Event to listener. |
|  withMetadata | boolean | Option to listener with info about event emitter. |

<b>Returns:</b>

Observable&lt;[WirePayload](./x-components.wirepayload.md)<!-- -->&lt;[XEventPayload](./x-components.xeventpayload.md)<!-- -->&lt;Event&gt;&gt; \| [XEventPayload](./x-components.xeventpayload.md)<!-- -->&lt;Event&gt;&gt;
